title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Tata Motors Commercial - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Tata Motors Commercial - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Motors Commercial! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Motors Commercial:
Tata Motors Commercial is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Commercial!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
